title: UHC Basics
description: A UHC texturepack that is tailored towards UHC players!
body:
# UHC BASICS

A texturepack for the UHC players!!
It features 
- Bigger golden apples
- Outlined planks
- Low Fire
- Weapon tweaks
- Bow and Crossbow loading animations
- No Explosion Particles

**Enjoy!!**
